name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA), allowing each party to disclose and protect confidential information for a defined purpose.

fields.label: Purpose
fields.help: How Confidential Information may be used.
fields.default: Evaluating whether to enter into a business relationship with the other party.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date the agreement takes effect.

fields.label: MNDA Term
fields.help: How long the MNDA itself lasts.

fields.label: MNDA Term (years)
fields.help: Years until the MNDA expires, if it expires.

fields.label: Confidentiality (years)
fields.help: Years of confidentiality, if a set number.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.help: The U.S. state whose law governs (e.g. Delaware).

fields.label: Jurisdiction
fields.help: City/county and state where disputes are handled.

fields.label: MNDA Modifications
fields.help: Any modifications to the Standard Terms (optional).
